focus_hypotheses: A composite semi-real probe should support multi-step perturbations so upper-name and lower-signature fragility can be measured together.
The current candidate should preserve middle_name, applicant_name, and signature_date even when top-name clipping and bottom overlap happen simultaneously.

changes.summary: Added augmentation_pipeline support so a semi-real probe can apply multiple deterministic perturbations in sequence.
Added withholding_dual_name_signature_probe combining top border clip with bottom edge overlap to validate coupled name/date robustness.

withholding_dual_name_signature_probe_v1.reason: Current candidate stayed exact on first_name, middle_name, applicant_name, and signature_date under the combined perturbation.

baseline_comparison.note: No inference-time OCR/parser code changed in this iteration, so baseline official metrics remain unchanged while semi-real coverage increased.

next_priorities: Design a composite probe that additionally introduces localized OCR confusion in the top-right middle-name band while preserving the dual top/bottom stress pattern.
Promote new external holdout withholding samples where top identity rows and bottom applicant rows degrade differently in real scans.
